sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Vanguard (EXPI) amendment shows 0 shares; subsidiaries report separately
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for eXp World Holdings Inc (EXPI), reporting 0 beneficial shares and 0% ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this amendment is an administrative reporting detail and does not reflect a market transaction or indicate beneficial ownership by Vanguard over EXPI shares.

feed.title: Buda Juice (BUDA) 2025 report: profits, key customer risk and expansion
feed.summary: Buda Juice, Inc. (BUDA) has filed its 2025 annual report, revealing net profits of $3.53 million for 2025 and $3.57 million for 2024, despite a decrease in gross profit margin due to higher produce costs. The company, which specializes in UltraFresh™ cold-crafted citrus juices, highlights a significant customer concentration risk, with one customer accounting for 97% of its 2025 net sales. Buda Juice plans a strategic three-hub expansion into South Carolina and Arizona/Nevada to mitigate this risk and serve a broader U.S. consumer base.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] Alto Neuroscience, Inc. Defin...
feed.summary: Alto Neuroscience, Inc. is holding its 2026 annual meeting on May 12, 2026, where stockholders will vote on several key proposals, including the election of two Class II directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor, and amendments to the 2024 Equity Incentive Plan and 2024 Employee Stock Purchase Plan. The proposed amendments aim to adjust the "evergreen" formulas in the equity plans to include pre-funded warrants in the calculation of annual share reserve increases, aligning with a recent securities purchase agreement. The Board recommends voting "FOR" all four proposals, emphasizing the importance of these changes for long-term equity flexibility and employee incentives.

feed.title: Dow CEO: “The die is cast” from Iran war for high petrochemical prices through the end of 2026
feed.summary: Dow CEO Jim Fitterling warns that petrochemical price spikes and shortages resulting from the Iran war will fuel inflation through the end of 2026, impacting construction, consumer goods, automotive, and aerospace industries. He highlights that almost 20% of global petrochemical capacity is blocked due to the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, causing significant arbitrage increases between the U.S. and Asia. While U.S. petrochemical producers benefit due to their natural gas-derived feedstocks, the global supply chain disruption and volatility are a major concern, potentially leading to rising interest rates and hindering economic growth.

feed.title: AFLAC Inc. Stock: Stable Supplemental Insurance Leader with Japan Exposure Amid Recent Analyst Cover
feed.summary: AFLAC Inc. holds a significant position in the supplemental health insurance markets of the US and Japan, valued by investors for its consistent dividends and resilient business model. Recent activities include a minor stake trim by a major holder and the reinstatement of analyst coverage by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, who issued a Market Perform rating with a $113 price target. The company's strategy focuses on product innovation and diversified distribution channels to maintain profitability and growth in both its key markets, despite currency volatility and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) After Its Recent Share Price Slide?
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has experienced a significant share price decline, raising questions about its current valuation. Despite a 36.8% drop over the past year, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 11.0% at its current price of US$32.17 compared to an estimated intrinsic value of US$36.13. The company's P/E ratio of 27.28x is higher than the industry average but lower than its direct peers, and it is slightly below Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio, further suggesting a modest undervaluation.

feed.title: YPF posts 2025 annual report online with audited financials

YPF remains a significant energy player in Argentina, producing 32% of the country's oil and 27% of its natural gas, and supplying 55.5% of the fuel market.
